members.name: GetPatchMargin
members.summary: Returns the size of the margin on the specified [enum Side].

members.name: SetPatchMargin
members.signature: public void SetPatchMargin(int margin, int value)
members.summary: Sets the size of the margin on the specified [enum Side] to [param value] pixels.

members.name: AxisStretchHorizontal
members.summary: The stretch mode to use for horizontal stretching/tiling.

members.name: AxisStretchVertical
members.summary: The stretch mode to use for vertical stretching/tiling.

members.name: DrawCenter
members.summary: If [code]true[/code], draw the panel's center. Else, only draw the 9-slice's borders.

members.name: PatchMarginBottom
members.summary: The height of the 9-slice's bottom row. A margin of 16 means the 9-slice's bottom corners and side will have a height of 16 pixels. You can set all 4 margin values individually to create panels with non-uniform borders.

members.name: PatchMarginLeft
members.summary: The width of the 9-slice's left column. A margin of 16 means the 9-slice's left corners and side will have a width of 16 pixels. You can set all 4 margin values individually to create panels with non-uniform borders.

members.name: PatchMarginRight
members.summary: The width of the 9-slice's right column. A margin of 16 means the 9-slice's right corners and side will have a width of 16 pixels. You can set all 4 margin values individually to create panels with non-uniform borders.

members.name: PatchMarginTop
members.summary: The height of the 9-slice's top row. A margin of 16 means the 9-slice's top corners and side will have a height of 16 pixels. You can set all 4 margin values individually to create panels with non-uniform borders.

members.name: RegionRect
members.summary: Rectangular region of the texture to sample from. If you're working with an atlas, use this property to define the area the 9-slice should use. All other properties are relative to this one. If the rect is empty, NinePatchRect will use the whole texture.

signals.name: TextureChanged
signals.summary: Emitted when the node's texture changes.

values.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_STRETCH
values.summary: Stretches the center texture across the NinePatchRect. This may cause the texture to be distorted.

values.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_TILE
values.summary: Repeats the center texture across the NinePatchRect. This won't cause any visible distortion. The texture must be seamless for this to work without displaying artifacts between edges.

values.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_TILE_FIT
values.summary: Repeats the center texture across the NinePatchRect, but will also stretch the texture to make sure each tile is visible in full. This may cause the texture to be distorted, but less than [constant AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_STRETCH]. The texture must be seamless for this to work without displaying artifacts between edges.

constants.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_STRETCH
constants.summary: Stretches the center texture across the NinePatchRect. This may cause the texture to be distorted.

constants.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_TILE
constants.summary: Repeats the center texture across the NinePatchRect. This won't cause any visible distortion. The texture must be seamless for this to work without displaying artifacts between edges.

constants.name: AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_TILE_FIT
constants.summary: Repeats the center texture across the NinePatchRect, but will also stretch the texture to make sure each tile is visible in full. This may cause the texture to be distorted, but less than [constant AXIS_STRETCH_MODE_STRETCH]. The texture must be seamless for this to work without displaying artifacts between edges.
